calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Off Calendar

Osc For Name Change. (Clerical Error Scheduled On 10-23-12)
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioner Petitioner Martha Alicia Rosales-Garcia mother of minors present in court. Addreess of Father of minors unknown.
Petitioner Sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Guillermo Paulo Rosas Rosales (Male DOB: 01/06/2008), and Ashley Rosas Rosales (Female DOB: 11/30/2012).

Decree Changing Name were submitted to and signed by the Court.
